channel.title: TSLA — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on TSLA (Tesla) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED TSLA (+10%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added TSLA in Q4 2025 · 0.5% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Tom Slater: TRIMMED TSLA (-8%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) trimmed TSLA in Q4 2025 · 6.8% of portfolio. Small Tesla trim — rebalancing.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Tom Slater)

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: ADDED TSLA (+6%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) added TSLA in Q4 2025 · 2.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Andreas Halvorsen)

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: ADDED TSLA (+46%) · Q3 2025
